commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=5b73eeb9cdcfb5f8891db172e9c00c8fab3fe761)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds Claude live `stream-json` diagnostic tool/progress events, an active-tool heartbeat, and regression coverage for watchdog freshness during silent native Claude tool execution.

PR surface: Source +243, Tests +170. Total +413 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: Partially: source inspection shows current main does not feed Claude live tool/progress events into diagnostic activity, and the PR body provides after-fix Crabbox proof for a silent active native tool. The exact post-tool_result stall from the linked issue was not reproduced here.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] Maintainer review should decide whether the active native-tool proof is sufficient to close the linked post-tool_result issue; there is no narrow code repair request from this review.

target.title: Fix Claude live tool progress for watchdog recovery
target.body:
## Summary

Fixes #86895.

Claude live sessions now feed parsed `stream-json` progress into diagnostic run activity. The runner tracks Claude-native `tool_use` / `tool_result` lifecycle events, emits trusted diagnostic tool events for Claude CLI tools, and sends a bounded active-tool heartbeat while a native Claude tool is running silently.

This keeps the Gateway stuck-session watchdog from aborting a valid long-running Claude-native foreground tool as an apparently stale embedded run.

## Verification

- `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode local`
- `OPENCLAW_VITEST_MAX_WORKERS=1 node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/cli-runner.spawn.test.ts`
- AWS Crabbox live proof: `run_ac64b101bd3c`, provider `aws`, lease `cbx_37e0f5558cdc`, exit `0`

## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: Claude live `chat.send` turns with a silent foreground Claude-native `Bash` tool no longer get recovered as stuck embedded runs while the tool is still running.

Real environment tested: AWS Crabbox Linux, Claude Code CLI `2.1.152`, Claude Opus 4.6 via `claude-cli`, Gateway `chat.send` webchat path.

Exact steps or command run after this patch: Ran a live `chat.send` repro with diagnostics enabled, `stuckSessionWarnMs=5000`, `stuckSessionAbortMs=15000`, and a required foreground Claude-native `Bash` call: `python3 -c "import time; time.sleep(45); print('OC86895-FOREGROUND-SLEEP-DONE')"`.

Evidence after fix: AWS Crabbox `run_ac64b101bd3c` on `cbx_37e0f5558cdc` exited `0`; diagnostics observed `toolStarted=1`, `toolCompleted=1`, `toolErrored=0`, `toolRunningProgress=4`, `streamProgress=27`, `resultProgress=1`, `recoveryAbortEmbeddedRun=0`, `stalledEvents=0`.

Observed result after fix: The live turn completed successfully in about 52s with no `abort_embedded_run` recovery, and the Gateway classified the active work as long-running tool work with recent `cli_live:tool_running` progress while the foreground Bash tool was silent.

What was not tested: Non-Claude live-session providers; this patch is scoped to the Claude live `stream-json` runner path.
target.author: joshavant
